title: No Explosion Pvp For U
description: This plugin disables health damage from all explosion sources except regular TNT, Ensuring close to vanilla feel while pretty much disabling cart, crystal, and anchor pvp.
body:
**DM ME ON DC [USER-WolfJTA] IF YOU WANT ME TO UPDATE THIS PLUGIN WITH A FEATURE YOU WANT OR TO HAVE ME MAKE A PLUGIN FOR YOU (FREEE)**

This plugin disables **health** damage from all explosion sources except regular TNT, allowing servers to maintain a near-vanilla experience while selectively disabling specific PvP strategies. By filtering out damage from end crystals, respawn anchors, minecarts, beds, and other explosive entities, it effectively neutralizes high-damage PvP metas. Ideal for survival or faction servers that want to promote more balanced combat, this lightweight plugin ensures that only traditional TNT explosions remain lethal, while all other blasts become purely cosmetic or utility-based.
